description: GitHub Projects v2 board field definitions. Bootstrap references this for idempotent creation (skips fields that already exist). The board is the source of truth (SoT) for progress status, and PROGRESS.md is a read-only view regenerated from this board.

fields.name: Roadmap-Item
fields.note: Identifier of the Epic/roadmap item this card belongs to

fields.name: E2E-Evidence
fields.note: E2E evidence path/URL. No original screenshot embeds (<2MB links/thumbnails)

fields.name: Horizon
fields.note: 3-tier roadmap horizon (Initiative/Epic/Task). For Roadmap view grouping/filtering. Consistent with gh-roadmap assets/fields.json. Already exists when the golden template is copied (idempotent).

fields.name: Start Date
fields.note: Start of the bar in the Roadmap view. Must be paired with Target Date for a 'duration bar' to be drawn (one side alone gives a dot/short bar). Consistent with gh-roadmap assets/fields.json. Date field wiring is UI-only (not possible via API). Already exists when the golden template is copied (idempotent).

fields.name: Target Date
fields.note: End of the bar in the Roadmap layout view (target release date). ★ Without this field the roadmap view cannot draw schedule bars — the data basis for the user requirement 'a big schedule picture on the roadmap'. Already exists when the golden template is copied (idempotent).

fields.name: Stage
fields.note: Loop's in-card step; Status stays the coarse column

fields.name: Wave
fields.note: Milestone-fanout parallel wave number, makes parallelism visible
